COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DENIED. PLAINTIFF HAS FAILED TO ESTABLISH AS A MATTER OF LAW THAT HE HAS AN OWNERSHIP INTEREST. THE FACTS ARE DISPUTED AS TO PLAINTIFF'S INTEREST AND THE DISPUTE CAN ONLY BE RESOLVED BY THE FILING OF A MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT BASED ON UNDISPUTED FACTS OR TRIAL. (PREVAILING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600

Off Calendar May-13-2008 Dismissal

Notice Of Motion For Ccp 872.720 Interlocutory Judgment & Appointment Of Referee In Partition Action
Off Calendar Dec-06-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING:

PLAINTIFF MARK MARTINI'S Motion For CCP 872.720 Interlocutory Judgment & Appointment Of Referee In Partition Action IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF HAS FAILED TO ESTABLISH AS A MATTER OF LAW THAT HE HAS AN OWNERSHIP INTEREST. THE FACTS ARE DISPUTED AS TO PLAINTIFF'S INTEREST AND THE DISPUTE CAN ONLY BE RESOLVED BY THE FILING OF A MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT BASED ON UNDISPUTED FACTS OR TRIAL. (PREVAILING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A FORM OF ORDER.)
JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600 (302/PJM/PB)
